type.description: Determines the color scheme and default icon of the snackbar.

timeout.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable auto-dismiss.

position.description: Screen corner / edge where the snackbar appears.

variant.description: Visual look and feel. 'soft' is a tinted surface card with a colored icon/title; 'solid' a filled accent card with white text; 'outlined' a surface card framed by an accent ring; 'gradient' a vivid diagonal fill; 'accent' a surface card with a colored top bar; 'glass' a frosted translucent panel; 'minimal' and 'pill' are compact single-line styles that drop the title.

size.description: Overall size. 'sm' yields a shorter, more compact snackbar; 'lg' a larger one. Works with any variant.

showCloseButton.description: Whether to render the dismiss (\u00d7) button.

onClick.description: Callback fired when the user clicks the snackbar body.

onClose.description: Callback fired when the snackbar closes. manual is true when closed by the user.

customIcon.description: Override the default type icon with a custom SVG icon component.
